case_title: FIRST INDEPENDENT BANK OF NEVADA,A NEVADA VS. DANIEL OTT, INDIVIDUALLY AND DANIEL OTT AS

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF FIRST INDEPENDENT BANK OF NEVADA,A NEVADA CORPORATION
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF FIRST INDEPENDENT BANK OF NEVADA,A NEVADA CORPORATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIRST INDEPENDENT BANK OF NEVADA,A NEVADA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DANIEL OTT, INDIVIDUALLY AND DANIEL OTT AS TRUSTEE OF THE OTT LIVING TRUST DATED APRIL 9, 2003 $606,605.51 PRINCIPAL, $614.36 INTEREST, $410.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $607,629.87, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST INDEPENDENT BANK OF NEVADA,A NEVADA CORPORATION SERVED JUN-10-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DANIEL OTT, INDIVIDUALLY AND DANIEL OTT AS TRUSTEE OF THE OTT LIVING TRUST DATED APRIL 9, 2003 PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON JUL-11-2012 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
